compiled_state.title: E2.4: port clarity-check + check-ac + quality-check + summary in-process
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port the 4 per-ticket gates to rebar._engine_support.gates (heuristic byte-parity).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 4 gates dispatch in-process via _GATES (no auto-init, matching dispatcher)
- [ ] Library clarity_check/check_ac/quality_check/summary rewired off _run
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash (scoring branches, AC floor, file-impact, story prose, --stdin, both --output, miss/arity)
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8)

comments.body: DONE (commit 482bbed8). Ported 4 gates to gates.py reusing reducer/show_state/deps_state; routed in-process via _GATES (no auto-init); library rewired. Dual-run parity green across typed fixtures + --stdin + both --output + miss/arity. Full interfaces tier 367 passed; live smoke OK. No bash deleted.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
